title: hilleria longifolia
intro: Hilleria longifolia, also known as the yellow root, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phrymaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hilleria longifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and help manage stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
